1st rowTechnical quality

3rd rowCheapest price offer/price of tender X---Measures to guarantee quality of deliverables, to support EFSA with business continuity plan, to maintain and improve an occupational health and safety and environmental management system
4th rowAnticipation of risks---Appropriate approach for unrestricted and fast access to survey data---Degree of facilitation of machine-to-machine communication---Degree to which contract builds on existing EMODnet structure---Quality of the method for establishing baselines and standards---Quality of the method of preparing digital terrain model---Quantity of primary data contributed to the project---Soundness of project management proposed to meet project deadlines and ensure quality of output---Strength of guarantee of the continuity of the service---Total quality criteria weighting---User-friendliness of web portal
5th rowProject management---Quality, relevance and technical strength of the proposed approach to achieve the objectives of the contract in the areas of Outreach and Communication---Quality, relevance and technical strength of the proposed approach to achieve the objectives of the contract in the areas of Support to Atlantic Steering Group (ASG) and its technical groups---Quality, relevance and technical strength of the proposed approach to achieve the objectives of the contract in the areas of Support to stakeholders, Guidance and Pro-active project development---Quality, relevance, completeness and coherence of the proposed approach to achieve the objectives of the contract in the area of Monitoring and Possible revision of the Action plan
